final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card for children explaining the story of 赤壁之战 from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key bullet points listed with punctuation on the side, and a cartoon story scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, presented for a child audience
Scene/backdrop: needs a 赤壁 river battle atmosphere — exact scene composition is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, engaging children's-book atmosphere — exact light and mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface treatment — exact rendering style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the card title (large, prominent); must include key story bullet points listed with punctuation marks alongside the illustration
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet points must be visually separated and marked with punctuation; cartoon story scene must occupy the main body area
Avoid:
